message:
✨ Add kubeconfig file watcher with reload callback

- Add fsnotify-based file watcher to detect kubeconfig changes
- Clear client cache on reload so new contexts are picked up
- Add SetOnReload callback for notifying consumers of config changes
- Add StopWatching for cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

 		s.app.Post("/api/mcp/tools/ops/call", mcpHandlers.CallOpsTool)

 	}
